h2c81833bg0bd1g4279g85c2gdda0951a5186: I have to say, it's one thing to have a parasite in your head, quite another not to know it's there.
hc04e5513g225dg4d1fgb208gf6728f3f70eb: What's more: these people weren't on the nautiloid with us. Just how many mind flayers are at work in these parts?
h4cd36f57g65fdg427dgbc12g3e07dabea2a3: The real question is: how does this all link to their belief in this 'Absolute'?
h64b0846eg65a8g40c8ga429g4b6c031afe19: Mind flayers excel at mind games. To enthral completely is their bread and butter.
h56cb5791gca62g46e2gbb60g6cd9b388a533: What if they perfected their craft by convincing their subjects they're not thralls at all, but that they have free will?
h63b2219ag6a7ag45afg8863g89c08c8bf471: That the commandments they experience are the will of a benevolent god.
hc34decdegf90eg4696ga224ga9147cf6d6d1: How terrifying a level of perfection that would be.
h0eae21d5g37abg4e9fgb1fag5a94d97bd3de: Do you really think there may be more mind flayers around?
h9e572a24ga174g406eg83f1g6a28b6fa1328: This True Soul and his acolytes are ample proof of that. They're ample proof of a dread suspicion as well.
he6bc1c4cg46fbg473bga94egdadbb73f3407: Let's move. I don't mean to lose daylight pondering idle questions.
h31ca453eg448ag4fadg83d9g6542f4fa6f37: You really do dismiss these events too casually.
